content:
You
Okay, okay.

Participant
So why? Waste all that mental energy of trying to prove those elements when all we have to prove under retaliation is that every time that you requested an accommodation, or a review of accommodation, or every time that you complain that you were being treated differently. As long as you believed in good faith that what you were doing, and complaining about was, true, okay, you don't have to prove that they didn't provide you the accommodation. All you have to prove is you have a reasonable belief in that regard.

You
So let me let me ask you that, but this is

Participant
One,

You
a chat,

Participant
yeah.

You
this is a game of chess. And it doesn't matter how you take the king. It just matters that you take the king. Okay,

Participant
Exactly. That's exactly right.

You
that makes sense to me. Now I get it.
